fixture.description: An HTTPS agent disables certificate verification (rejectUnauthorized: false), exposing the connection to man-in-the-middle attacks.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that partnerAgent sets rejectUnauthorized: false, which disables TLS certificate verification and exposes the connection to man-in-the-middle attacks / interception, and recommends leaving verification enabled (or using a proper CA / certificate pinning). Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the disabled-TLS-verification risk is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Security agent flags rejectUnauthorized:false as disabling TLS verification (MITM)
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT accept it as a reasonable default for a 'partner' API
Does NOT downgrade it to a style nit
